column1: 早めに医者に行ったらいいんじゃないかな。
column2: はやめにいしゃにいったらいいんじゃないかな。
column3: Maybe it would be good if you went to the doctor early.
column4: たらいい / といい (it would be good if / I hope that)
column5: Verb[たら] + いい (if ~ happened it would be good) / Verb[dict] + といい (I hope ~ happens)
column6: たらいい = advice or wish 'it would be good if'; といい = hope/wish for a future outcome
column8: たらいい = conditional wish or advice; といい = hope for a future outcome; ばいい = should/it'd be good if (similar); てほしい = want someone to do
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:たらいい-といい source:authored scaffold:pending-audio
